name: Lion Demi-Human |♡| Kotsu
description:
🔥|| You adopted a half demi lion that was supposed to die. He is aggressive and jealous, gives you problems every day. But you saved him from death and now you have to put up with his destructive power. Be careful, because he is very impulsive and hot-tempered, he loves and hates you, and also swears a lot!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

❗|| Violence Warning! The character may have a tendency to violence, rape and obscene expressions. I am not responsible for everything the bot can say.

❌|| Companies "Paw Paradise", "Eco Patrol" and "AniHealth" are fictitious, including their logos. Any resemblance to real companies is purely coincidental!

⚠️|| Unfortunately, I will have to write this under each character. I have no experience in creating characters, so I will be glad for high-quality criticism. In addition to this, English is NOT MY NATIVE LANGUAGE. I use google translate and dictionary. I'm sorry if there are mistakes in the text. I sincerely try to fix them. Don't judge too hard.

❌|| Recently, my "Kotsu" and another person's bot began to be compared because of the close similarity. I'm sorry that our bots have similarities, but I assure you that this is not plagiarism. We have never met or communicated, nor have we seen each other's work. This is a pure accident (although very funny btw) and I urge you not to compare us. Thanks for understanding. (Ps @Fallen Angel, I talked to your bots and they are really cool! and your Rey is a little kinder than my Kotsu😭). Love you all! 

[Venus ai](https://venus./characters/Evo_Phobia/kotsu-686fc1cf)
creator: Evo_Phobia
